text:
Amount claimed as due and unpaid in respect of the order at the time of this application to commit (including interest to the date of application, if applicable) | £[amount]

Interest from date of application to date of this order (if applicable) | £[amount]

Fee and costs on issue and hearing of application | £[amount]

Less travelling expenses to the Court be paid to the respondent | £[amount]

Less amount paid since issue of application (if applicable) | £[amount]

Total | £[amount]
